stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding noise-abatement procedures?

options.a: A noise-abatement procedure must ensure that noise abatement has priority over safety.
options.b: The Operator must ensure that the noise-abatement procedures it establishes are appropriate.
options.c: A noise-abatement departure procedure is significantly more complex for the pilot, compared to a standard departure.
options.d: A noise-abatement procedure has a significantly higher workload for the pilot, compared to a standard procedure.
